title: stelis chalatantha
intro: Stelis chalatantha, a type of orchid native to Central and South America, is a species of flowering plant that belongs to the orchid family (Orchidaceae). The plant is used in traditional medicine due to its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties. The health benefits of Stelis chalatantha include its potential to treat wounds, reduce fever, and alleviate respiratory issues. In herbal preparations, the plant is often used to make teas and infusions, as well as being incorporated into traditional remedies for various ailments.
